# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

This project tracks the current main branch.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Report security issues privately to the repository owner instead of opening a public issue.

Include:
- a short description of the issue
- the impacted endpoint or file
- reproduction steps
- any proof of concept payloads

## Local Deployment Guidance

Keep the dashboard and ingest server bound to localhost unless you have a controlled private network setup.
